author: Marie Carmel Moïse
text: I just got my roof replaced by the Smart Company they are the best,  good treatment , great customer service.  They kept me updated on everything,  very profesional. They expedite the process and it was done at no time. Great job, good price I am very please with the work. Excellent,  I strongly recommend.

author: A. M. Covin
text: The Smart Company restored, and painted our deck and fence. They did an amazing job and will definitely use them in the future.

author: Bill Beckstrand
text: Used  The Smart Compant to repaint my house very high quailty and time effienct, would recommend them to anyone who needs there house painted

author: John Duran Toyota (John Duran Autos)
text: Thanks to Zeta I came across this team of professionals that help me and my family to fix my roof, great service.

author: m s
text: Great customer service kept me updated on on how the process was going even though the insurance took a while they were patient and understanding. Thank you !!!!
